creator: dchapes@ddm.on.ca
text:
The emulators/vice port is seriously out of date, the ports tree has
version 0.14.1 while the current version is 1.0.

I guess that's my fault since I'm listed as the maintainer :-).

Fix: What follows is a shar archive of a vice 1.0 port.  Although I started
with the vice-0.14.1 port I'm submitting a shar archive instead of diffs
since the patches and PLIST have extensively changes.
